_about: Champion class overrides — final source of truth, supersedes Fandom data. Use sparingly: only when the Fandom wiki returns garbage (disambiguation pages, recombined-champion infoboxes, etc.) or has no usable class field for that champion. The refresh-classes script skips Fandom entirely for champions listed here.
_format: Keys are champion IDs from seed.json. Values are one of: Mutant, Skill, Science, Mystic, Cosmic, Tech. Each entry can optionally include a reason for why the override exists, stored under "_reasons" — not used by the script, just documentation.

_reasons.maestro: Fandom infobox returns 'Combined' from disambiguation/recombination page. In-game class confirmed Cosmic.
_reasons.spider-woman: Fandom page exists but has no |class= field in the infobox. In-game class confirmed Science.
